display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programme.desc: The discovery of a wreck off of Florida's coast sends a team of underwater explorers on a mission to discover the identity of a ship that simply shouldn't exist.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programme.desc: In 1925 the SS Cotopaxi carrying coal and 32 men vanished. It has since become synonymous with one of the ocean's greatest mysteries - the Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Morris Traveller / Subaru Impreza P: The Mathewsons sell a 1958 Bedford D122 and a 1969 Vanden Plas Princess, and meet a collector who may be willing to part with a huge hot hatch collection.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: There is a triple collection of desirable cars in store for Derek when an MG Midget, an Austin-Healey 'frogeye' Sprite and an RS2000 come up for auction.

programme.title: The Men and the Machines That Beat Hitler
programme.desc: Mark Urban tells the incredible story of six heroic veterans who served in the Royal Tank Regiment in WWII, starting with their time in Dunkirk and North Africa.

programme.title: The Men and the Machines That Beat Hitler
programme.desc: Mark Urban continues the story of men from the Fifth Royal Tank Regiment. This moving final episode covers D-Day, the battle for Normandy and eventual victory in Germany.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents as the team values rarities at Leeds Town Hall. Among the items brought in by West Yorkshire residents are a valuable diamond brooch.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the second programme from Leeds Town Hall. The experts value an enormous sculpture of carved elephants.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave's on his way to Grimsby to pick up an iconic 80s fast Ford, the Mk1 Fiesta XR2.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek gets a tour of Hadlow Castle in Kent when he arrives to collect the owner's pre-war Alvis and an immaculate Citroen used by the Gestapo in occupied France.

programme.title: The Men and the Machines That Beat Hitler
programme.desc: Mark Urban tells the incredible story of six heroic veterans who served in the Royal Tank Regiment in WWII, starting with their time in Dunkirk and North Africa.

programme.title: The Men and the Machines That Beat Hitler
programme.desc: Mark Urban continues the story of men from the Fifth Royal Tank Regiment. This moving final episode covers D-Day, the battle for Normandy and eventual victory in Germany.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents as the team values rarities at Leeds Town Hall. Among the items brought in by West Yorkshire residents are a valuable diamond brooch.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming journeys through Royal Leamington Spa and the historic town of Warwick with its medieval castle.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Nothing screams 1970s more than a Mk3 Ford Cortina 2000E. Derek Mathewson heads to Brigg to value a 1974 example with classic Coke bottle styling and a Pinto engine.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The guys are drawn by the curves of a stunning 1999 Morgan with an incredible 4.6 V8 engine, but things aren't as good as they seem when they get to the garage.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave's on his way to Grimsby to pick up an iconic 80s fast Ford, the Mk1 Fiesta XR2.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek gets a tour of Hadlow Castle in Kent when he arrives to collect the owner's pre-war Alvis and an immaculate Citroen used by the Gestapo in occupied France.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Morris Traveller / Subaru Impreza P: The Mathewsons sell a 1958 Bedford D122 and a 1969 Vanden Plas Princess, and meet a collector who may be willing to part with a huge hot hatch collection.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Cheshire and Wirral, where items include a 1920s dancehall lighting system, an antique butter churn and an old enamel advertising sign.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programme.desc: The discovery of a wreck off of Florida's coast sends a team of underwater explorers on a mission to discover the identity of a ship that simply shouldn't exist.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programme.desc: Divers search a newly discovered wreck as they investigate the story of the SS Justicia, sunk in WW1 by U-Boats off the coast of Ireland.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programme.desc: A marine biologist and a deep-sea diver explore Chuuk Lagoon, one of the world's greatest underwater graveyards, for a wreck discovered on sonar hit nearly 20 years ago.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave's son Jack is heading out to Cheshire to collect two cars with a 35-year age difference. And luckily for Mathewsons, Lucy knows exactly what has been brought in.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A 1970 Excalibur Roadstar, once owned by Roy Orbison, arrives at Thornton le Dale and Derek heads to County Durham to collect a 1935 Austin 7 Ulster that's been rebuilt.

programme.title: D-Day To Berlin
programme.desc: Allied forces broke out from the Normandy beach-head in June 1944 and advanced across Europe, but tensions grew between Eisenhower and Montgomery.

programme.title: D-Day To Berlin
programme.desc: Anglo-American relations toward the end of 1944 began to sour as the Allies fought in the conference chamber for the right to direct the final assault on Germany.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Somerleyton Hall, Suffolk, where items include objects from the plane that brought Rudolf Hess to Britain.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team examine objects brought to Hopetoun House by the Firth of Forth, including an illustration of Queen Victoria's first visit to Balmoral.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek is picking up two expertly crafted Batmobile replicas in the home counties and Dave can't control his enthusiasm for a Ford US wartime jeep.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul is picking up a stunning 1961 Vauxhall Cresta, inspired by American design, the car changed the face of British motoring.

programme.title: D-Day To Berlin
programme.desc: Allied forces broke out from the Normandy beach-head in June 1944 and advanced across Europe, but tensions grew between Eisenhower and Montgomery.

programme.title: D-Day To Berlin
programme.desc: Anglo-American relations toward the end of 1944 began to sour as the Allies fought in the conference chamber for the right to direct the final assault on Germany.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Somerleyton Hall, Suffolk, where items include objects from the plane that brought Rudolf Hess to Britain.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming sets out to explore the meandering waterways of inner city Birmingham including the Soho Loop and the Engine Arm Canal.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: A cherished wartime iron workhorse needs to be hauled 160 miles from the Churnet Valley Railway in Staffordshire to a winter extravaganza in Oxfordshire.

programme.title: Seven Worlds One Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates a look at life on each continent, revealing how each distinct land mass has shaped the creatures found there, beginning with Antarctica.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek is picking up two expertly crafted Batmobile replicas in the home counties and Dave can't control his enthusiasm for a Ford US wartime jeep.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul is picking up a stunning 1961 Vauxhall Cresta, inspired by American design, the car changed the face of British motoring.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Christmas parcels filled with drugs at Customs, Immigration interview a passenger claiming to have millions but zero proof and souvenirs from Samoa are under the spotlight at Biosecurity.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: An unsecured load of metal pierces the window of another vehicle in a sudden stop. Driving blind with fogged windows. Police follow a dangerous driver speeding and undertaking on the emergency lane.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Season Finale: Niall and Ruben are not related by blood but as close as you can get. When things fall apart, it's the tightest bonds that break the hardest. S1 E6

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: Leo suspects someone’s been inside his house. And when Clive brings his son Saul to work in Leo’s bar, events soon reach a shocking conclusion. S1 E2

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Cindy feels the weight.

programme.title: George Clarke's Remarkable Renovations
programme.desc: Season Finale: Project manager Sam and plasterer Jimmy bought a 5000 square Victorian pie factory for £160,000. They have sold both their houses and are pouring their life savings into the renovation

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Electrician Mick takes on the challenge of a lifetime when he and artist wife Belynda decide to build their dream Modernist home in the bucolic Dooralong Valley, on the NSW Central Coast.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Go Girls
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Ted wants to protect his friends from the witch that is Candy McMann. But an angel also needs his protection. S5 E1

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: Clarkson's Farm
programme.desc: Faced with planning officers from the West Oxfordshire District Council, Clarkson tries to convince them to let him run a farm restaurant.

programme.title: Lotto
programme.desc: Takashi Sorimachi stars as Satoru Tachibana, an advertising firm employee slaving away under a younger boss for a meager salary. With a pachinko habit, no savings, and no prospects of romance since his divorce, Tachibana is left wondering what the future holds for him. One day, he desperately enters a lottery, trying to make enough money to pay for his child support, but his sense of self-disgust

programme.title: Celebrity Race Across The World
programme.desc: The teams travel through the breathtaking beauty of Costa Rica, a country that contains five per cent of the world’s biodiversity, before reaching Panama, the seventh country of the race.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Series Premiere: Mrs Brown has family troubles to contend with: her son Dermot has fallen out with his long-term girlfriend Maria Nicholson, and Granddad is feeling poorly. S1 E1

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Viliami questions his behaviour.

programme.title: The Twelve
programme.desc: Colby faces trouble as the accused’s wife and victim’s ex reveal what led to Amanda’s murder. S3 E2

programme.title: Nothing Trivial
programme.desc: Brian faces fatherhood, while Emma struggles with her own dad, and Michelle tries to get out of commitment. S2 E9

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Brackenreid and some fellow inspectors unwind in a remote lodge, but their respite turns deadly when they find themselves hunted by a killer.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a skeleton is found bricked up inside the wall of an old house, Murdoch must track down a killer who thought they got away with it.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A mysterious saboteur tries to stop Kembleford winning the Three Counties choir competition.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Van Pelt's career is put in jeopardy when a witness is killed in her care, leaving the team to work out the identity of the murderer and protect the victim's daughter.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When two hikers are discovered murdered near a remote coastal trail, the team is on the hunt for a fugitive duo wanted in a series of grisly campsite murders.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. When a strange fire is proved to be the work of a bomber with a vendetta, Carrie must use her extraordinary memory to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Humphrey and Martha's romantic weekend at the remote Hotel Cecile is disrupted by the murder of the hotel owner on the first night of their stay.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Brackenreid and some fellow inspectors unwind in a remote lodge, but their respite turns deadly when they find themselves hunted by a killer.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a skeleton is found bricked up inside the wall of an old house, Murdoch must track down a killer who thought they got away with it.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Van Pelt's career is put in jeopardy when a witness is killed in her care, leaving the team to work out the identity of the murderer and protect the victim's daughter.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When two hikers are discovered murdered near a remote coastal trail, the team is on the hunt for a fugitive duo wanted in a series of grisly campsite murders.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A mysterious saboteur tries to stop Kembleford winning the Three Counties choir competition.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. When a strange fire is proved to be the work of a bomber with a vendetta, Carrie must use her extraordinary memory to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Return to Paradise
programme.desc: I.P. Tide: Brilliant DI Mackenzie Clarke leaves London and returns to her hometown of Dolphin Cove in Australia, just in time for a local man to wash ashore with a knife in his back.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: On Sabrina's first day with Serious Crimes, an investigation into a woman's murder leads her into the sinister side of the tech world as she adjusts to a more dangerous role.

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: After an explosion at a secret prison, prisoners go missing, including serial killer Richard Harris. The government enlists former FBI profiler Bex Henderson to find him.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A mysterious saboteur tries to stop Kembleford winning the Three Counties choir competition.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Humphrey and Martha's romantic weekend at the remote Hotel Cecile is disrupted by the murder of the hotel owner on the first night of their stay.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When two hikers are discovered murdered near a remote coastal trail, the team is on the hunt for a fugitive duo wanted in a series of grisly campsite murders.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Brackenreid and some fellow inspectors unwind in a remote lodge, but their respite turns deadly when they find themselves hunted by a killer.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a skeleton is found bricked up inside the wall of an old house, Murdoch must track down a killer who thought they got away with it.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates the death of a man found in a burned-out truck and catches a glimpse of the impossible - a long-gone nemesis back from the dead.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A man appears after a bright flash of light in the middle of a field and claims to have been abducted by aliens.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown investigates the mysterious death of a beekeeper.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Hightower temporarily replaces Teresa on an investigation into the death of a gold prospector, where the detectives' discoveries lead them to suspect his girlfriend.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The team uncovers distorted loyalties that form when personal ties meet the trappings of fame when a troubled young pop star is suspected of killing her fiance.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series following a former detective with a flawless memory. Carrie finds herself labelled as the prime suspect when old foe Walter Morgan is found dead.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The president of the Saint Marie cricket club is found shot dead in the middle of the team's ground. As the sun rises over the island, suspicion falls on his teammates.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates the death of a man found in a burned-out truck and catches a glimpse of the impossible - a long-gone nemesis back from the dead.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A man appears after a bright flash of light in the middle of a field and claims to have been abducted by aliens.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Hightower temporarily replaces Teresa on an investigation into the death of a gold prospector, where the detectives' discoveries lead them to suspect his girlfriend.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The team uncovers distorted loyalties that form when personal ties meet the trappings of fame when a troubled young pop star is suspected of killing her fiance.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown investigates the mysterious death of a beekeeper.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series following a former detective with a flawless memory. Carrie finds herself labelled as the prime suspect when old foe Walter Morgan is found dead.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The president of the Saint Marie cricket club is found shot dead in the middle of the team's ground. As the sun rises over the island, suspicion falls on his teammates.

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: Arch and Fitz race against time to save a kidnapped flight attendant, and then one of their own.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Bunty reunites with Father Brown to uncover a dark secret and mysterious goings-on at the local girls' borstal.

programme.title: Sue Perkins: Along The Mexico Border
programme.desc: Sue Perkins visits the city of Juarez, which adjoins El Paso on the other side of the border, the two effectively forming a single large city with 57 miles of border walls.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews reassure a frightened elderly patient with a dislocated hip, treat a baby with a dangerously high temperature, attend a woman with a fast heart rate and help an alcoholic.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The blue lights are flashing as the crews attend a woman with dangerously high blood pressure, a 20-year-old with chest pains, and a woman who has smashed her face in a fall.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The paramedics treat a woman whose legs have dramatically swollen, a girl having panic attacks, and a very ill and unconscious man.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews attend an HGV driver suffering dizzy spells and a woman who has fallen into a bush. They also move a man with a spinal injury who has no sensation from the neck down.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews reassure a frightened elderly patient with a dislocated hip, treat a baby with a dangerously high temperature, attend a woman with a fast heart rate and help an alcoholic.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The blue lights are flashing as the crews attend a woman with dangerously high blood pressure, a 20-year-old with chest pains, and a woman who has smashed her face in a fall.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The paramedics treat a woman whose legs have dramatically swollen, a girl having panic attacks, and a very ill and unconscious man.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews attend an HGV driver suffering dizzy spells and a woman who has fallen into a bush. They also move a man with a spinal injury who has no sensation from the neck down.

programme.title: David Jason's Great British Inventions
programme.desc: David Jason examines British innovations in the history of engineering, beginning with a look at wheeled vehicles like the Penny Farthing and Stephenson's rocket.

programme.title: David Jason's Great British Inventions
programme.desc: David Jason examines British innovations in the history of flight, from the first glider to the modern jet suit, and discovers how Britain contributed to the moon landing.

programme.title: David Jason's Great British Inventions
programme.desc: David Jason operates one of the world's biggest hydraulic cranes, gets behind the wheel of a tank, and discovers the story behind the invention of the hovercraft.

programme.title: David Jason's Great British Inventions
programme.desc: The actor examines British innovations in the home from the lightbulb to the lawnmower, and discovers the role Queen Victoria played in creating the telephone.

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: A Sea King rescue helicopter requires a new engine installing, as well as giant rotor blades and a 1970s computer system reviving, before it can return to the skies.

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: On a wartime bomber base in Lincolnshire, veteran engineer Gerry Cooper rebuilds two pre-war biplanes with glorious histories; the US Navy N3N and the Morane Saulnier 315.

programme.title: David Jason's Great British Inventions
programme.desc: David Jason examines British innovations in the history of engineering, beginning with a look at wheeled vehicles like the Penny Farthing and Stephenson's rocket.

programme.title: David Jason's Great British Inventions
programme.desc: David Jason examines British innovations in the history of flight, from the first glider to the modern jet suit, and discovers how Britain contributed to the moon landing.

programme.title: David Jason's Great British Inventions
programme.desc: David Jason operates one of the world's biggest hydraulic cranes, gets behind the wheel of a tank, and discovers the story behind the invention of the hovercraft.

programme.title: David Jason's Great British Inventions
programme.desc: The actor examines British innovations in the home from the lightbulb to the lawnmower, and discovers the role Queen Victoria played in creating the telephone.

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: A Sea King rescue helicopter requires a new engine installing, as well as giant rotor blades and a 1970s computer system reviving, before it can return to the skies.

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: On a wartime bomber base in Lincolnshire, veteran engineer Gerry Cooper rebuilds two pre-war biplanes with glorious histories; the US Navy N3N and the Morane Saulnier 315.

programme.title: David Jason's Great British Inventions
programme.desc: David Jason examines British innovations in the history of engineering, beginning with a look at wheeled vehicles like the Penny Farthing and Stephenson's rocket.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson joins forces with his brother David and uncle Matheson for landscape painting, an organised treetop adventure park and fly fishing on a picturesque Northumbrian lake.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Desert Fortress: Steve and an elite team of rock climbers head to the desert of southern Oman to attempt the first ascent of a towering escarpment.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Dark Shadow: The team battle through the jungle into the heart of Indonesian Borneo to caves holding secrets that could rewrite history.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Frozen Frontier: Steve and his team of explorers head to Greenland in the Arctic. Kayaking the world's largest fjord, they dodge giant icebergs and hungry polar bears.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Maya Underworlds: Steve heads into Yucatan, Mexico, on the trail of the ancient Maya. Uncovering secrets and artefacts, they push far into the underworld of the Maya.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Desert Fortress: Steve and an elite team of rock climbers head to the desert of southern Oman to attempt the first ascent of a towering escarpment.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Dark Shadow: The team battle through the jungle into the heart of Indonesian Borneo to caves holding secrets that could rewrite history.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Frozen Frontier: Steve and his team of explorers head to Greenland in the Arctic. Kayaking the world's largest fjord, they dodge giant icebergs and hungry polar bears.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Maya Underworlds: Steve heads into Yucatan, Mexico, on the trail of the ancient Maya. Uncovering secrets and artefacts, they push far into the underworld of the Maya.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek auctions off a Jensen Interceptor and a Jensen Healey along with a one-off Wood & Pickett Triumph Dolomite Sprint.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Rover 2000 SC / Triumph Spitfire: A 1971 Mercedes SL and a 1989 Jaguar XJS emerge from a chicken farm barn, a Roller and a Rover go under the hammer, and a 1966 Triumph Spitfire is restored.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek takes a shine to a rare 1958 Armstrong Siddeley Sapphire with a long family history and a convertible Triumph Herald brings a few smiles on auction day.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: An Aston Martin DB6 in need of total restoration looks set to break the Mathewsons auction record and news of a rare Vincent motorbike arriving causes a stir.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up some emerging sporting classics from the far east when three Datsun Zs appear, and an unusual lot arrives that run on caterpillar tracks not wheels. S3 Ep.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Fearless fishing! Amity is 100 miles offshore in the infamous Devil's Hole - things look bleak for skipper Jimmy as the engines which haul in his nets are near to failure.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: More high drama on the high seas as we follow trawler fishermen in Peterhead in Scotland. Trawler Ocean Venture is caught in a force nine gale that endangers the lives of her crew.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Homer recount how Marge almost fell in love with a college professor during the 1990s. S19 E11

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the midst of a nationwide helium shortage, Leonard and Sheldon are forced to make a black market purchase from a dealer in order to complete an experiment. S9 E6

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Lacey misjudges Tane. Mackenzie needs space. Richie is welcomed in by the Langhams.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Cindy feels the weight.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: Another 20 home cooks enter the MasterChef kitchen to compete for 10 aprons. For those who miss out, they learn there will be one final chance to cook for the last four aprons tomorrow. S18 E2

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Season Finale: Just one hunt stands between the final four players and a prize of up to £100,000. But the last hunt brings a fiendish twist, big-money challenges - and the ultimate test of trust...

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Potential love interests are introduced by gradually revealing their naked bodies... Then the contestants must choose a partner based on their first impressions.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Five fearless comics continue to battle for Taskmaster Greg Davies’s coveted golden bonce. Today: hungry ogres, free money and invisible circles with Rhod Gilbert & James Acaster. S7 E2

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs link a body with severe burn marks to possible execution by electric chair - and to a legendary Vegas murder. S11 E12

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A teenage bride disappears, just months after getting married. Police investigations reveal a shocking secret that exposes a deadly love triangle. S7 E4

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: As Tom faces a decision between a lucrative partnership at a big firm and taking over the Frobisher lawsuit, Ellen and David's long hours at work jeopardise their relationship. S1 E5

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Store manager Glenn gets overly excited when the Cloud 9 corporate magazine, Stratus, is interested in a story. S1 E2

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature. Follow the friendship of these two prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Toi Time is back with a bang! Join Aunty Anika, Māia, Jojo, Tama, Buzz, and the new kid on the block, Riki. Get ready for laughter, learning, and lots of fun!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join this merry band of Smurfs on their many magical adventures as they try to outsmart the wicked sorcerer Gargamel and his cat Azrael.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy are superheroes and roommates who love to save the day. But what happens when they're not fighting crime?

programme.title: Darwin And Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother and sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Tamaiti Satalo
programme.desc: Talofa! Sing and dance with A, E, I, O, and U as they explore their beautiful island home and learn Gagana Samoa (Samoan) with the help of their friends.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: Another 20 home cooks enter the MasterChef kitchen to compete for 10 aprons. For those who miss out, they learn there will be one final chance to cook for the last four aprons tomorrow. S18 E2

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Cindy feels the weight.

programme.title: Football
programme.desc: Live coverage of the New Zealand All Whites first FIFA World Cup 2026 warm up match against Haiti (FIFA rank 83) from Chase Stadium in Fort Lauderdale, Florida.

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Each week, five groups of bonza, ripper, fair dinkum Aussies become travel critics as they head on a week-long holiday. This week's destination - Israel!

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Homer and Marge become trapped in a tunnel of love at a carnival, three Valentine's Day stories unfold. S19 E12

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy has a date which Leonard, Penny and Bernadette secretly spy on. Sheldon has Howard and Raj help him find a new girlfriend since they found Amy for him. S9 E8

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Remi appeals to David. Sonny's a prime suspect. Mali snaps.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Viliami questions his behaviour.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: The 20 remaining hopefuls have a second and final chance to cook their way into the competition. Just who will score themselves one of the final four places? S18 E3

programme.title: New Zealand Spy
programme.desc: Season Finale: With only hours before Dennis Green’s plan succeeds, the spies must act fast — and together — to save the nation they swore to protect. S1 E6

programme.title: Taskmaster Australia
programme.desc: Series Premiere: Taskmaster Australia is back. Contestants give memorials for eggs, get new middle names and travel to a new location. S5 E1

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Colette tries to bridge a growing divide at the office by bringing the driving examiners and counter clerks together; Vic stubbornly avoids seeing a doctor after an unusual injury. S1 E17

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Rhod Gilbert force-feeds Greg's exec sec Alex Horne a jug of mocha, Kerry Godliman boshes a cricket ball with a croquet mallet and Phil Wang makes a really strange noise. S7 E3

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A night full of celebration ends with a bang when the director of a scholarship foundation for the deaf is killed by a deadly car bomb. S11 E13

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A couple form a sinister business partnership, as well as a romantic attachment. Police begin to become suspicious when they realise that a medical tragedy is not all it appears to be. S7 E5

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: The New Amsterdam staff grapple with the aftermath of the recent Supreme Court decision on abortion rights. S5 E7

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: With the case pushing Ellen and David's relationship to breaking point, Gregory Malina comes under increasing pressure to testify. S1 E6

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Everyone becomes obsessed with a mannequin that looks exactly like Jonah. S1 E4
